_notes: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. VERIFY these against each provider's current pricing before publishing cost numbers; they change often. Snapshot the date whenever you edit. Entries flagged "_unverified": true use a predecessor's rate as a placeholder and MUST be confirmed against real BYOK billing before any cost claim. gpt-5.6 tiers are from OpenAI's July 2026 pricing.

models._legacy_note: Below: superseded models, kept for scoring historical runs. gpt-4o (OpenAI), gemini-2.5-pro (Google), deepseek-chat (DeepSeek, retires 2026-07-24).

_estimation._scaffold_note: Fixed prompt overhead (system + instructions + task + writer_summary) added to every input estimate. Tune to your actual review prompt length.
